Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Continued To Sep-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Wagner, via ZOOM, for Charles Silverman, Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel their plan to file a Petition for Termination pursuant to probate code 12251. The court also confirms with counsel that there are no outstanding creditor's claims.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to September 15, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status on Filing of Petition for Termination is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
